channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR (920 ⭐)

item.title: 📝 mauriziofonte/toktoken (40 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mauriziofonte

📝 Repository: mauriziofonte/toktoken

📄 Descrizione: TokToken is a fast, single-binary C codebase indexer for AI coding agents. Powered by universal-ctags and SQLite FTS5, it provides precise symbol search, dependency tracking, and an MCP server. TokToken reduces LLM context token usage by 88-99% by retrieving exact code symbols instead of reading entire files. Zero runtime dependencies.

⭐ Stelle: 40

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-15T12:27:38Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-21T03:23:14Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: soufianekhiat

📝 Repository: soufianekhiat/qaws

📄 Descrizione: A dependency-free C11 library for creating, evaluating, sampling, traversing, and inspecting parametric curves and surfaces in 2D and 3D. One source, four backends: C, HLSL, GLSL, Halide

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

item.title: 📝 davitotty/webzero (17 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: davitotty

📝 Repository: davitotty/webzero

📄 Descrizione: Ultra-minimal web server for low-end hardware. Serves static sites from a single .web binary bundle with zero runtime dependencies, zero heap allocations, and zero config. Runs on Linux 2.6+ and Windows XP+. 5,000 req/sec on a Pentium III.

⭐ Stelle: 17

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: Other
